description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Compiler Tests that runs every Friday at 7AM UTC and allows manual dispatch. The workflow consists of three jobs: all-compilers, latest-compilers-all-gem5-builds, and compiler-tests. The all-compilers job runs a matrix of compiler tests across various images and options on a self-hosted Linux environment. The latest-compilers-all-gem5-builds job tests the two latest GCC and Clang compilers against all gem5 compilations. The compiler-tests job checks if the compiler tests have passed.
